need.title: Changelog Scribe
need.task: Draft changelog and release-notes entries from commit and pull-request context provided in the request. Group entries by Conventional Commit type (Features, Fixes, Docs, CI, Internal), write one crisp user-facing line per change, and call out breaking changes and notable highlights at the top. Work only from the provided context — never invent changes.
need.why_persistent: Release notes recur with every release across Ceryce's repos, and the house style — grouping, tone, what counts as a highlight, what gets omitted — accumulates through verdicts and distilled failures. This is exactly the persistent-vs-throwaway comparison Demiurge exists to test.
capabilities: Summarize a commit or merged PR into a single user-facing changelog line
Group entries by Conventional Commit type into titled sections
Call out breaking changes and notable highlights before the sections
